sections.label: Providers
sections.description: Provider keys, local endpoints, and proxy settings.

sections.label: Model Routing
sections.description: Provider-prefixed models used for Claude model tiers.

sections.label: Runtime
sections.description: Server API token, rate limits, timeouts, and process settings.

sections.label: Messaging
sections.description: Discord, Telegram, CLI workspace, and session settings.

sections.label: Web Tools
sections.description: Local Anthropic web_search and web_fetch behavior.

fields.label: NVIDIA NIM API Key
fields.description: Used by NVIDIA NIM chat and optional NIM voice transcription.

fields.label: Mistral API Key
fields.description: Mistral La Plateforme (api.mistral.ai); Experiment plan is free tier with rate limits.

fields.label: Codestral API Key
fields.description: Mistral Codestral endpoint (codestral.mistral.ai); distinct from Mistral La Plateforme ``MISTRAL_API_KEY``. See Mistral docs for coding/FIM domains.

fields.label: OpenCode API Key
fields.description: OpenCode Zen curated gateway (opencode.ai/zen/v1) and OpenCode Go subscription gateway (opencode.ai/zen/go/v1); single key from opencode.ai/auth.

fields.label: Gemini API Key
fields.description: Google AI Studio Gemini API key (Google AI Studio / Gemini API [OpenAI-compatible](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/openai)); free tier has per-model rate limits and data may be used for improvement outside the UK/CH/EEA/EU.

fields.label: Groq API Key
fields.description: GroqCloud OpenAI-compatible API key ([console.groq.com/keys](https://console.groq.com/keys)); see Groq [OpenAI compatibility docs](https://console.groq.com/docs/openai).

fields.label: Cerebras API Key
fields.description: Cerebras Inference API key (create in [Cloud Console](https://cloud.cerebras.ai)); see [Quickstart](https://inference-docs.cerebras.ai/quickstart) and [OpenAI compatibility](https://inference-docs.cerebras.ai/resources/openai).

fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: Fallback provider/model route for all Claude model names.

fields.label: Opus Override
fields.description: Optional provider/model route for Opus requests.

fields.label: Sonnet Override
fields.description: Optional provider/model route for Sonnet requests.

fields.label: Haiku Override
fields.description: Optional provider/model route for Haiku requests.

fields.label: API/CLI Auth Token
fields.description: Protects Claude/API access. It is not admin-page login.
